lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਜੀਅ ਜੀਅਨ ਕੋ ਭਾਗਹੀਨ ਨਹੀ ਭਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: satigur daataa jeea jeean ko bhaagaheen nahee bhaavaigo |
lines.english: The True Guru is the Giver of the life of the soul, but the unfortunate ones do not love Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਏਹ ਵੇਲਾ ਹਾਥਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਪਰਤਾਪੈ ਪਛੁਤਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: fir eeh velaa haath na aavai parataapai pachhutaavaigo |7|
lines.english: This opportunity shall not come into their hands again; in the end, they will suffer in torment and regret. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਇਆ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਮੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਸਮ ਲਗਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੮॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak deaa deaa kar tthaakur mai satigur bhasam lagaavaigo |8|3|
lines.english: Nanak prays: please show kindness and compassion to me, O my Lord and Master, that I may apply the dust of the True Guru to my forehead. ||8||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋ ਭਲਾ ਲੋੜੈ ਭਲ ਅਪਨਾ ਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਢਹਿ ਢਹਿ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: je ko bhalaa lorrai bhal apanaa gur aagai dteh dteh paavaigo |
lines.english: If a good person seeks goodness for himself, he should bow low in humble surrender to the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਗਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: man har rang raataa gaavaigo |
lines.english: O mind, be attuned to His Love, and sing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਸਦ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਤਿਨਾ ਘਰਿ ਆਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: har rang raataa sad bairaagee har nikatt tinaa ghar aavaigo |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the Lord's Love remain balanced and detached forever; they live near the Lord, who comes into their house.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭੈ ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ਭਏ ਹੈ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਲਾਗਿ ਲਗਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bhai traas bhe hai niramal guramat laag lagaavaigo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Fear of God makes me fearless and immaculate; I am dyed in the color of the Guru's Teachings. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਪੰਕ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾਂ ਜੀਵਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਆਪਿ ਦਿਵਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tin kee pank milai taan jeevaa kar kirapaa aap divaavaigo |1|
lines.english: If I am blessed with the dust of their feet, then I live. Granting His Grace, He Himself bestows it. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਉਲਟਿਓ ਜਨਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: fir ulattio janam hovai gur bachanee gur purakh milai rang laavaigo |2|
lines.english: But their lives are transformed through the Word of the Guru's Teachings. Meeting with the Guru, the Primal Being, they are dyed in the color of His Love. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਲੋਭਿ ਲਗੇ ਹੈ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਮਨਿ ਕੋਰੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਆਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: dubidhaa lobh lage hai praanee man korai rang na aavaigo |
lines.english: Mortal beings are attached to greed and duality. Their minds are unripe and unfit, and will not accept the Dye of His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀ ਦਸੇ ਦਸੇ ਫੁਨਿ ਧਾਵਤ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣੀਆ ਖਿਨੁ ਨ ਟਿਕਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: eindree dase dase fun dhaavat trai guneea khin na ttikaavaigo |
lines.english: There are ten organs of sense and action; the ten wander unrestrained. Under the influence of the three dispositions, they are not stable, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਰਚੈ ਵਸਗਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਮੋਖ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਸੋ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satigur parachai vasagat aavai mokh mukat so paavaigo |3|
lines.english: Coming in contact with the True Guru, they are brought under control; then, salvation and liberation are attained. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਅੰਕਾਰਿ ਏਕੋ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਏਕਸ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: oankaar eko rav rahiaa sabh ekas maeh samaavaigo |
lines.english: The One and Only Creator of the Universe is All-pervading everywhere. All shall once again merge into the One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਰੂਪੁ ਏਕੋ ਬਹੁ ਰੰਗੀ ਸਭੁ ਏਕਤੁ ਬਚਨਿ ਚਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: eko roop eko bahu rangee sabh ekat bachan chalaavaigo |4|
lines.english: His One Form has one, and many colors; He leads all according to His One Word. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕੋ ਏਕੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਇ ਲਖਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh eko ek pachhaataa guramukh hoe lakhaavaigo |
lines.english: The Gurmukh realizes the One and Only Lord; He is revealed to the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਇ ਮਿਲੈ ਨਿਜ ਮਹਲੀ ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦੁ ਬਜਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: guramukh jaae milai nij mahalee anahad sabad bajaavaigo |5|
lines.english: The Gurmukh goes and meets the Lord in His Mansion deep within; the Unstruck Word of the Shabad vibrates there. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਕੋ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਆਇ ਜਾਇ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bin gur bhette ko mehal na paavai aae jaae dukh paavaigo |6|
lines.english: Without meeting the Guru, no one obtains the Mansion of His Presence. They suffer the agony of coming and going in reincarnation. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭ ਸਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh sisatt upaaee guramukh sobhaa paavaigo |
lines.english: God created all the beings and creatures of the universe; He blesses the Gurmukh with glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨੇਕ ਜਨਮ ਵਿਛੁੜੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਗੁਰੂ ਮਿਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: anek janam vichhurre mere preetam kar kirapaa guroo milaavaigo |
lines.english: For countless lifetimes, I have been separated from my Beloved; in His Mercy, the Guru has united me with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਤ ਮਹਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਤਿ ਮਲੀਨ ਬਿਗਸਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: satigur milat mahaa sukh paaeaa mat maleen bigasaavaigo |7|
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, I have found absolute peace, and my polluted intellect blossoms forth. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਜਗਜੀਵਨ ਮੈ ਸਰਧਾ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਗਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: har har kripaa karahu jagajeevan mai saradhaa naam lagaavaigo |
lines.english: O Lord, Har, Har, please grant Your Grace; O Life of the World, instill faith in the Naam within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੂ ਹੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਰਨਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੮॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak guroo guroo hai satigur mai satigur saran milaavaigo |8|4|
lines.english: Nanak is the Guru, the Guru, the True Guru; I am immersed in the Sanctuary of the True Guru. ||8||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਚਾਲ ਚਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: man guramat chaal chalaavaigo |
lines.english: O mind, walk on the Path of the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਮੈਗਲੁ ਮਸਤੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਤਲਿ ਕੁੰਡੇ ਗੁਰ ਅੰਕਸੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jiau maigal masat deejai tal kundde gur ankas sabad drirraavaigo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Just as the wild elephant is subdued by the prod, the mind is disciplined by the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲਤੌ ਚਲੈ ਚਲੈ ਦਹ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: chalatau chalai chalai deh deh dis gur raakhai har liv laavaigo |
lines.english: The wandering mind wanders, roams and rambles in the ten directions; but the Guru holds it, and lovingly attunes it to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਦੇਇ ਰਿਦ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਚੁਆਵੈਗੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: satigur sabad dee rid antar mukh amrit naam chuaavaigo |1|
lines.english: The True Guru implants the Word of the Shabad deep within the heart; the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord, trickles into the mouth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸੀਅਰ ਬਿਸੂ ਭਰੇ ਹੈ ਪੂਰਨ ਗੁਰੁ ਗਰੁੜ ਸਬਦੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: biseear bisoo bhare hai pooran gur garurr sabad mukh paavaigo |
lines.english: The snakes are filled with poisonous venom; the Word of the Guru's Shabad is the antidote - place it in your mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਭੁਇਅੰਗ ਤਿਸੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਝਾਰਿ ਝਾਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: maaeaa bhueiang tis nerr na aavai bikh jhaar jhaar liv laavaigo |2|
lines.english: Maya, the serpent, does not even approach one who is rid of the poison, and lovingly attuned to the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਆਨਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਗਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵੈਗੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sat santokh dharam aan raakhe har nagaree har gun gaavaigo |3|
lines.english: Truth, contentment, righteousness and Dharma have settled there; in the village of the Lord, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਆਨੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਨਗਰ ਮਹਿ ਸਬਲਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਾਰਿ ਕਢਾਵੈਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: suaan lobh nagar meh sabalaa gur khin meh maar kadtaavaigo |
lines.english: The dog of greed is very powerful in the village of the body; the Guru strikes it and drives it out in an instant.
